stemHtml: A cargo jet is flying at FL360, when the crew suddenly hears a loud bang, followed by the formation of mist and suction of loose objects towards the rear of the cabin. The pilots start to follow their company’s procedure. What shall be their first actions?

options.a: Descend as rapidly as possible to reach an altitude with sufficient oxygen partial pressure, don oxygen mask and inform ATC.
options.b: Ask ATC for descent clearance, don oxygen mask and descend at a shallow angle to prevent decompression sickness.
options.c: Don an oxygen mask, start a quick descent and inform ATC.
options.d: Initiate descent, inform ATC and don oxygen mask.
